rawSql.description: Execute SQL against the workspace GAD database and return result rows.

query.description: Execute a read-oriented SQL query against the workspace GAD database.

status.description: Return compact GAD storage and projection status metrics.

ensureBlob.description: Ensure that a content digest is registered in GAD blob metadata.

listUserNotificationsForMe.description: List durable notifications for the host-verified current account.

acknowledgeUserNotification.description: Acknowledge one durable notification for the current account.

putUserNotification.description: Create or update one durable account notification from a trusted runtime.

deleteUserNotification.description: Withdraw one durable account notification from a trusted runtime.

getTrajectoryBranchHead.description: Return the durable head record for one trajectory branch.

listTrajectoryEvents.description: List hydrated trajectory events after an optional sequence cursor.

appendChannelEnvelope.description: Atomically append one semantic envelope to a durable channel log.

appendChannelEnvelopeWithRegistryMutatio.description: Append an envelope and its message-type registry mutation atomically.

listMessageTypes.description: List active custom message-type definitions for a channel.

getMessageType.description: Get one custom message-type definition from a channel registry.

getChannelEnvelope.description: Get one hydrated channel envelope by its durable id.

getTrajectoryForEnvelope.description: Resolve the private trajectory lineage that published an envelope.

listPublishedEnvelopesForTrajectory.description: List published envelope lineage matching trajectory selectors.

getEnvelopesForTrajectory.description: List hydrated published envelopes for matching trajectory selectors.

getPublishedArtifactsForTurn.description: List published artifacts attributed to one durable agent turn.

getPrivateLineageForPublishedEnvelope.description: Return publication lineage plus the private branch events behind an envelope.

getDownstreamConsumers.description: List trajectory events that consumed a published envelope.

readChannelEnvelopes.description: Read one bounded page of hydrated semantic channel envelopes.

inspectChannelEnvelopes.description: Read one bounded page of compact channel-envelope diagnostics.

listStoredValueRefs.description: List stored-value references matching event, envelope, or digest selectors.

inspectStorageDiagnostics.description: Inspect oversized or unresolved durable storage rows with bounded output.

inspectPublicationIntegrity.description: Inspect publication mappings and sequence integrity.

inspectTurnState.description: Inspect open, streaming, and duplicate durable turn state.

inspectInvocationState.description: Inspect projected and journaled invocation lifecycle state.

inspectChannelRoster.description: Inspect durable participant membership for one channel.

inspectAgentHealth.description: Return one compact integrity and in-flight activity snapshot for an agent channel.

validateGadHashes.description: Validate content, manifest, and state hashes without mutating durable state.

clearDirtyAfterValidation.description: Clear the dirty marker only after durable hash validation succeeds.

checkGadIntegrity.description: Run durable GAD integrity checks and return structured errors.

rebuildTrajectoryProjections.description: Rebuild trajectory-derived projections from the durable event log.
